description: Calculate the shortest delivery route from the Warehouse to the Customer using the road network provided in /home/ga/GIS_Data/road_network.geojson. Use the Warehouse (South-West corner) and Customer (North-East corner) points from /home/ga/GIS_Data/logistics_stops.geojson as the start and end points. Export the resulting shortest path layer as a GeoJSON file to /home/ga/GIS_Data/exports/delivery_route.geojson.
